name: nyyon-figures
description: Render nyyon's editorial diagrams and featured covers from a spec — locally, no network, no model.
long_description: A local, offline renderer for nyyon's brand visual system. Ships 16 parametric diagram templates (contrast, layers, cycle, fanout, columns, grid, funnel, timeline, quadrant, pyramid, venn, table, pipeline, radial, bigstat, progression) plus a 1200x630 featured cover, the global brand settings (paper/ink with a single cool-purple accent), and the reasoning prompt that maps an article to a figure set. The calling assistant reads the reasoning prompt, picks the templates and fills the slots, then calls the render tools — which rasterize SVG to PNG at 2x via resvg and write the files locally. Nothing leaves the machine.

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List the 16 diagram templates + cover with their slot schemas.

tools.name: get_reasoning_prompt
tools.description: Get the prompt for turning an article into a figure set + cover.

tools.name: get_settings
tools.description: Get the active brand theme (colors, fonts, sizes, overrides).

tools.name: render_figure
tools.description: Render one diagram from a template + slots to a PNG.

tools.name: render_cover
tools.description: Render the 1200x630 featured cover from title/kicker/highlight/sub.

tools.name: render_set
tools.description: Render a whole figure set + cover in one call.
